sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Zero debt, $20M cash: Rail Vision grew 2025 revenue 14.4%
feed.summary: Rail Vision (RVSN) reported a 14.4% year-over-year revenue increase to $1.487 million for full-year 2025, with second-half revenue up 132% to $1.25 million. The company ended 2025 with approximately $20 million in cash and zero financial debt, while narrowing its GAAP net loss to $11.1 million from $30.7 million in 2024. Strategic moves included acquiring a 51% stake in Quantum Transportation and securing new commercial orders and pilots in various regions.

feed.title: [Form 4] REDWOOD TRUST INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: REDWOOD TRUST INC director Debora Horvath received 10,961.73 Deferred Stock Units, valued at $5.38 per share, as part of her director compensation. These units are 100% vested at grant, have no expiration date, and represent equity-based compensation without an immediate cash transaction. The transaction was reported on March 31, 2026, and is detailed in the SEC Form 4 filing.

feed.title: [Form 4] REDWOOD TRUST INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: This article details an insider trading activity for Redwood Trust Inc. (RWT), specifically a Form 4 filing. Director Greg H. Kubicek received 18,529.880 deferred stock units as part of his director compensation, which are 100% vested at grant and convertible to common shares at $5.38 per share. The transaction, dated March 31, 2026, increases his direct holdings of deferred stock units to the same amount.

feed.title: RGC Resources marks 328th straight quarterly cash dividend
feed.summary: RGC Resources (Nasdaq: RGCO) has declared its 328th consecutive quarterly cash dividend of $0.2175 per share, payable on May 1, 2026, to shareholders of record on April 17, 2026. This consistent payout highlights the company's long-standing financial stability and commitment to returning value to shareholders. The company also noted that forward-looking statements are subject to various risks, including gas prices, supply, geopolitical factors, and regulatory challenges.

feed.title: Rezolve AI (RZLV) Is Down 7.4% After Hiking 2026 Guidance and Announcing Reward Loyalty Deal
feed.summary: Rezolve AI (RZLV) reported significant revenue growth for 2025 and raised its 2026 revenue guidance to US$360 million, supported by US$232 million in contracted revenue. The company also announced the acquisition of Reward Loyalty UK for US$230 million to expand its market presence. Despite these positive updates and aggressive growth targets for its AI platform, the stock was down 7.4%.

feed.title: Citigroup Raises Price Target for Range Resources (RRC) to $50
feed.summary: Citigroup has raised its price target for Range Resources (RRC) to $50, maintaining a Neutral rating, which signifies a 16.28% increase from the previous target. This adjustment reflects a cautiously optimistic sentiment among analysts, as several other firms have also recently increased their price targets for RRC. Range Resources is a prominent exploration and production company focused on the Marcellus shale in Southwest Pennsylvania.

feed.title: Range Resources (RRC) SVP McDowell sells 8,250 shares, retains large stake
feed.summary: Range Resources' SVP & General Counsel, Erin W. McDowell, sold 8,250 shares of common stock at $48.00 per share in an open-market transaction. Following this sale, she still directly holds 84,451 shares and has indirect interests in an additional 68,504 unvested shares and 5,509 shares in a deferred compensation account. The transaction, reported via SEC Form 4, indicates a net sale of $396,000 worth of shares, but her total holdings demonstrate a continued significant stake in the company.

feed.title: Range Resources (NYSE: RRC) CFO granted 50,563 performance-based shares
feed.summary: Range Resources (NYSE: RRC) CFO Mark Scucchi was granted 50,563 performance-based shares of Common Stock valued at $47.65 per share on March 27, 2026. This award, compensation-related rather than a market purchase, was based on performance criteria from a March 2023 performance stock unit grant, with 120% vesting for TSR PSUs and 156.44% for Absolute Measure PSUs. Following this grant, Scucchi directly holds 731,851 shares, with additional indirect holdings in unvested stock, a 401k, and an IRA.

feed.title: RNAZ (RNAZ) delays 2025 Form 10-K after $25M preferred placement and acquisition
feed.summary: TransCode Therapeutics, Inc. (RNAZ) has delayed the filing of its 2025 Form 10-K, citing complex accounting requirements following several significant transactions on October 8, 2025. These include the acquisition of ABCJ, LLC, a $25 million private placement of Series B preferred stock, and the issuance of contingent value rights (CVRs). The company requires additional time to finalize valuations and accounting for various items like IPR&D, goodwill, and deferred taxes.

feed.title: B Riley Financial options imply 10.8% move in share price post-earnings
feed.summary: Options trading for B Riley Financial (RILY) suggests a potential 10.8% price movement after its upcoming earnings release, which translates to about a 79-cent change. This implied volatility is significantly higher than the company's historical median move of 4.3% over the past eight quarters post-earnings. The pre-earnings options volume indicates higher activity in calls compared to puts, with a ratio of 8:5.

feed.title: RIME SEC Filings - Algorhythm Holdings Inc 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides a comprehensive resource for Algorhythm Holdings (NASDAQ: RIME) SEC filings, including annual 10-K, quarterly 10-Q, and material event 8-K reports, along with insider trading forms. StockTitan offers AI-powered summaries of these documents to help investors understand the company's financial health, strategic transformation into an AI logistics and distribution business (SemiCab), and capital market activities. Recent filings detail leadership changes, a registration statement for common stock resale and warrant shares, financial information for its acquired Indian subsidiary SMCB Solutions Private Limited, and a secured prepaid equity line with Streeterville Capital.

feed.title: Reitar Logtech (RITR) director discloses large Class A and B stakes
feed.summary: Reitar Logtech Holdings Ltd director Yiu Chun Yip has filed an initial Form 3, disclosing significant indirect holdings of 6,520,000 Class A ordinary shares and 3,260,000 Class B ordinary shares through Smart Wealthy Investment Limited. This filing establishes him as a major shareholder and director, but does not report any new purchases or sales. The disclosure provides transparency on his substantial beneficial ownership in the company.

feed.title: Nasdaq warns Reitar Logtech (Nasdaq: RITR) over sub-US$1.00 share price
feed.summary: Nasdaq has notified Reitar Logtech (RITR) that it is not in compliance with its listing rule due to its Class A ordinary shares trading below US$1.00 for 30 consecutive business days. The company has 180 calendar days, until September 22, 2026, to regain compliance by having its closing bid price at or above US$1.00 for at least 10 consecutive business days. Reitar Logtech's business operations are unaffected, and management plans to monitor the share price and may consider options like a reverse share split to meet Nasdaq's requirements.

feed.title: Reitar Logtech (RITR) swings to H1 2025 loss as revenue drops 71%
feed.summary: Reitar Logtech Holdings (RITR) reported a significant net loss of HK$42.9 million for the first half of fiscal year 2025, a sharp decline from a net income of HK$24.3 million in the prior year. This downturn was primarily due to a 71% drop in revenue to HK$55.5 million, as major construction projects neared completion, and operating expenses more than doubled due to higher staff costs, increased credit loss allowances, and a substantial impairment charge. Despite these losses, the company expanded its balance sheet through the acquisition of Jingxing Holdings Limited and is strategically shifting towards medium- and large-scale projects and cold chain operations to stabilize future revenue and margins.

feed.title: Rocket Lab, JELD-WEN, Astronics, Wabtec, and Redwire Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Rocket Lab, JELD-WEN, Astronics, Wabtec, and Redwire shares surged after markets rebounded, influenced by stabilizing oil prices and reports that President Trump was considering de-escalating military conflict in Iran. This news eased investor concerns about sustained high energy costs and potential economic slowdowns, driving a positive shift in market sentiment. JELD-WEN, despite its recent volatility, saw its shares jump, but is still significantly down year-to-date and from its 52-week high, highlighting the impact of geopolitical tensions on cyclical sectors.

feed.title: Red Cat (NASDAQ:RCAT) Trading 12.9% Higher - Here's Why
feed.summary: Red Cat (NASDAQ:RCAT) shares jumped 12.9% after the company announced strategic moves to boost its autonomy and swarming capabilities, including the acquisition of Apium Swarm Robotics and a partnership with Ukraine’s Spetstechnoexport. Despite these positive developments and an average analyst price target of $20.67, the company remains loss-making, facing risks from dilution, integration challenges, and geopolitical exposure. Analysts have a mixed view, with ratings ranging from "Buy" to "Sell."

feed.title: QUIK Financials: Revenue Breakdown, Margins & Competitor Comparison
feed.summary: Quicklogic Corp (QUIK) generates revenue primarily from mature products (53% of sales, $1.08M) and new products within the Semiconductors industry. The company reports a gross margin of 18.08%, but negative operating (-93.46%) and net (-96.38%) margins, with a Return on Equity of -52.19%. QUIK, with a market capitalization of $166.22M, competes with MVIS and GSIT, and its gross margin is compared against these rivals.

feed.title: RELY Technical Analysis & Stock Price Forecast
feed.summary: This article provides a technical analysis of Remitly Global Inc. (RELY) as of March 31, 2026. It indicates a "Neutral" overall technical sentiment based on a combination of moving averages and oscillators, with key support at $14.947 and resistance at $16.507. The stock is currently trading below its 200-day simple moving average.

feed.title: BREIF-B Riley Financial Q4 EPS USD 2.77
feed.summary: B. Riley Financial reported its Q4 EPS at $2.77. This brief announcement was published by Reuters through TradingView News.

feed.title: Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Reports FDA Acceptance of IND Application for UX016
feed.summary: Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical announced that the FDA has accepted its Investigational New Drug (IND) application for UX016, an experimental small-molecule prodrug for GNE myopathy (GNEM). A phase I/II clinical trial for UX016 is expected to begin in the latter half of 2026, aiming to assess its safety, efficacy, and pharmacokinetics in adult GNEM patients. The company currently holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) and has four other approved therapies on the market.

feed.title: Rekor Systems reports $48.45M revenue and $(0.26) EPS in 2025 10-K
feed.summary: Rekor Systems reported fiscal 2025 revenue of $48.45 million and a net loss of $31.46 million, driven by higher Public Safety perpetual license sales. The company achieved an improved loss per share of $(0.26) and narrowed operating losses through cost-efficiency measures and a favorable shift in product mix. Strategic growth included the acquisition of ATD, focusing on smart-city and AI solutions, and operational efficiencies like workforce reductions and consolidated engineering.

feed.title: Rekor hits first operating cash inflow quarter as annual losses narrow
feed.summary: Rekor Systems (NASDAQ: REKR) reported its full-year 2025 financial results, showing a 5% increase in revenue to $48.45 million and an improved adjusted gross margin of 55.9%. The company significantly narrowed its Adjusted EBITDA loss by 38% to $(18.10) million and achieved positive operating cash flow in Q4 2025 for the first time. Despite these operational improvements, the stock saw a 5.54% decline following the news, suggesting a mixed market reaction possibly due to ongoing net losses and past dilution concerns.

It notes that Wall Street analysts currently forecast QTEC's stock price to rise, although specific data points for growth, profitability, and efficiency are not yet available. The platform aims to offer analysis, price targets, and a 2026 outlook for investors.

feed.title: Stonepine Capital (QNRX) files Form 4 as 10% owner with no trades
feed.summary: Stonepine Capital Management, LLC, a ten percent owner of Quoin Pharmaceuticals, Ltd. (QNRX), has filed a Form 4 with the SEC, indicating no reported purchases, sales, or other share transactions. The filing notes that due to a change in outstanding shares, Stonepine Capital now beneficially owns less than 10% of Quoin Pharmaceuticals' outstanding ordinary shares, despite being classified as a 10% owner on the form. This Form 4 suggests a neutral impact on sentiment as it reports no new trading activity.

feed.title: Executive pay, board elections headline The Pennant Group (PNTG) 2026 proxy
feed.summary: The Pennant Group (PNTG) has released its 2026 proxy statement, detailing proposals for its annual meeting on May 14, 2026. Stockholders will vote on the election of three Class I directors, the ratification of Deloitte & Touche LLP as the independent auditor, and an advisory vote on executive compensation. The company emphasizes its performance-based executive pay structure and significant stockholder engagement.

feed.title: Rapport Therapeutics COO Gault sells $281k in stock
feed.summary: Rapport Therapeutics COO Cheryl Gault sold 10,000 shares of common stock for a total of $281,857 on March 30, 2026, under a pre-arranged trading plan. This sale occurred after a significant 176% surge in the company's stock over the past year. The company recently announced positive fiscal year 2025 earnings and advanced timelines for Phase 3 studies of RAP-219, leading several analysts to reiterate their Buy ratings with increased price targets.

feed.title: Rapport Therapeutics (RAPP) COO sells 10,000 shares under Rule 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Rapport Therapeutics' COO, Cheryl Gault, sold 10,000 shares of common stock in open-market transactions on March 30, 2026, under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on December 10, 2025. The sales were conducted in two tranches at weighted average prices of $28.0401 and $28.5530, totaling approximately $281,857. Following these transactions, Gault directly holds 159,914 shares.

feed.title: Qiagen N.V. Stock: Oversold Opportunity in Sample-to-Insight Leader Amid Biotech Sector Shifts
feed.summary: Qiagen N.V. shares are trading near 52-week lows, presenting a potentially oversold opportunity for North American investors interested in the molecular diagnostics and life sciences sector. The company, a leader in Sample-to-Insight solutions, has received analyst upgrades and seen increased institutional interest despite recent market pressure. Its strategic focus on high-growth areas like next-generation sequencing and precision medicine, coupled with its strong balance sheet, positions it for potential recovery and growth in the second half of 2026.

feed.title: Permianville Royalty Trust Experiences Valuation Adjustment Amid Competitive Market Landscape
feed.summary: Permianville Royalty Trust has recently adjusted its valuation, with a P/E ratio of 29 and a price-to-book value of 1.52. The trust has outperformed the S&P 500 over the past week and year, though its longer-term performance lags behind the broader market. When compared to peers like Bain Capital Specialty Finance and North European Oil Royalty Trust, Permianville Royalty Trust's valuation appears more elevated.

feed.title: Stryker names Nick Mead Vice President, Investor Relations
feed.summary: Stryker has appointed Nick Mead as Vice President, Investor Relations, effective May 1, 2026. Mead brings 20 years of experience within Stryker, having held various leadership roles in finance across multiple divisions. Concurrently, Jason Beach, the former Vice President, Finance and Investor Relations, has been named Vice President, Group Chief Financial Officer, MedSurg and Neurotechnology.

feed.title: SPG Stock News Today | Earnings, Events & Price Alerts
feed.summary: This article provides recent news, events, and price alerts for Simon Property Group (SPG) stock. Key updates include the recent passing of CEO David Simon and the subsequent appointment of Eli Simon as the new CEO and President, alongside Larry Glasscock as Non-Executive Chairman. The article also highlights various news reports on the company's performance, stock movements, and an extended credit facility.

feed.title: Constellation Energy (CEG) Shares Dip Following $3.9B Capital Investment Announcement
feed.summary: Constellation Energy (CEG) shares dipped by 2.2% after the company announced a $3.9 billion capital investment plan and released 2026 EPS guidance of $11-$12, which falls slightly below the Wall Street consensus of $11.60. Despite this, the energy provider aims to capitalize on increasing demand for carbon-free electricity, fueled by AI infrastructure and electrification, and projects an annual base EPS expansion exceeding 20% through 2029. In an unrelated event, Constellation Software (CSU), a distinct entity, acquired $12.3 million worth of Sabre Corp (SABR) shares.

feed.title: REGL PE Ratio & Valuation, Is REGL Overvalued
feed.summary: This article analyzes the valuation of ProShares S&P MidCap 400 Dividend Aristocrats ETF (REGL), determining it to be in the "Fair zone" based on its forward PS ratio compared to its five-year average. It discusses REGL's fair value using a relative valuation method and compares its P/S ratio to the industry average. The article also provides current P/B, FCF Yield, Forward P/E, and Forward P/S ratios for REGL as of April 1, 2026.

feed.title: Raytech Holding (RAY) director Li Shihua listed as reporting insider on Form 3
feed.summary: Raytech Holding Ltd director Li Shihua has filed an initial insider ownership report on Form 3, identifying Li Shihua as a director. The filing indicates no reportable stock transactions, such as purchases, sales, or option exercises. This Form 3 signifies Li Shihua's initial statement of beneficial ownership, showing zero shares beneficially owned and a neutral net buy/sell direction.

feed.title: PRPL SEC Filings - Purple Innovatio 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides a comprehensive resource for Purple Innovation (PRPL) SEC filings, including 10-K annual reports, 10-Q quarterly earnings, and 8-K material events, with AI-powered summaries and impact analysis. The filings offer detailed insights into the company's financial condition, business strategy, and governance. Recent activities covered include Q3 2025 financial results, a significant shareholding report by SomniGroup, and amendments to executive compensation agreements.

feed.title: Quetta Acquisition Corporation (NASDAQ: QETA) files Form 12b-25 for late 10-K
feed.summary: Quetta Acquisition Corporation (QETA) has filed a Form 12b-25 notification with the SEC, indicating that it will be late in filing its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The delay is attributed to difficulties in completing the financial statements for the report, which the company states could not be resolved without unreasonable effort or expense. QETA anticipates filing the Annual Report within fifteen calendar days following the original prescribed due date.

feed.title: Q/C Technologies (NASDAQ: QCLS) files Form 12b-25 delaying 2025 10-K
feed.summary: Q/C Technologies, Inc. (QCLS) has filed a Form 12b-25, indicating that it will be unable to file its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ended December 31, 2025, on time. The company requires additional time to complete and finalize its financial statements and anticipates filing the Form 10-K within fifteen calendar days after the prescribed due date. This routine late-filing notice was signed by Executive Chairman Joshua Silverman on March 31, 2026, and does not suggest any financial restatements.

feed.title: Protagonist Therapeutics stock hits all-time high at 105.71 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Protagonist Therapeutics (PTGX) stock has reached an all-time high of $105.71, currently trading at $105.99, demonstrating a 125.11% increase over the past year. Analysts predict profitability this year with earnings of $3.78 per share, despite the stock appearing overvalued. Recent FDA approval for its psoriasis drug, Icotyde, has further boosted investor confidence and led to multiple analyst price target increases.

feed.title: Phreesia (NYSE: PHR) outlines $24B opportunity and AccessOne expansion
feed.summary: Phreesia (NYSE: PHR) has detailed its platform growth and a $24 billion total addressable market opportunity, showcasing its diversified revenue model across subscriptions, payment solutions, and Network Solutions. The company's recent acquisition of AccessOne expands its healthcare payment and financing capabilities, while it highlights its integrated software and patient engagement platform's role in supporting 180 million patient visits in fiscal 2026. Phreesia also reported a net income of $2.3 million for fiscal year 2026, a significant improvement from a net loss in the previous fiscal year, and has refinanced a bridge loan with a new $275 million revolving credit facility.

feed.title: Patriot National Bancorp 10-K: Total interest $47.8M, EPS $(0.17)
feed.summary: Patriot National Bancorp (PNBK) reported total interest and dividend income of $47.8 million and a net loss of $12.7 million, or $(0.17) per share. Despite an increase in non-interest income and improved credit trends, higher operating expenses and lower loan balances led to a decline in net interest income. The company focused on balance sheet repositioning and liquidity enhancement, resulting in an improved net loss compared to the prior year.

feed.title: CEO Steven Sugarman receives 2,089,043 Patriot (PNBK) shares
feed.summary: Patriot National Bancorp's President and CEO, Steven Sugarman, received 2,089,043 shares of voting common stock from the vesting of 4,049,593 restricted stock units (RSUs) on March 25, 2026. The remaining 1,960,550 RSU shares were withheld to cover tax obligations. Following this transaction, Sugarman directly holds 2,089,043 shares, with an additional 9,019,978 shares held indirectly through a living trust.

feed.title: Pony AI (PONY) VP sells 22,946 shares in mandatory tax sell-to-cover
feed.summary: Pony AI Inc. Vice President Zhang Ning sold 22,946 Class A Ordinary Shares at $8.6875 per share in a mandatory sell-to-cover transaction. This sale was non-discretionary and intended to cover income tax liabilities from vested restricted stock units. After the transaction, Zhang Ning directly holds 612,539 Class A Ordinary Shares.

feed.title: Plus Therapeutics Reports Granting of Inducement Awards Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
feed.summary: Plus Therapeutics, Inc. announced the granting of inducement awards to two new employees. These awards, consisting of stock options and restricted stock units, were issued under the Company's 2015 New Employee Incentive Plan and approved by the Compensation Committee as required by Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4) to entice new talent. The awards vest over several years, contingent on continued employment.

feed.title: CPI Card Group (PMTS) officer nets more shares as RSUs vest
feed.summary: CPI Card Group Inc.'s Controller & Chief Accounting Officer, Donna Abbey Carmignani, exercised 371 restricted stock units (RSUs) into common shares on March 29, 2026. To cover mandatory taxes, 104 shares were withheld by the company, resulting in a net increase of 267 shares to her direct holdings, totaling 10,184 common shares. This transaction represents a routine compensation vesting and not an open-market sale.

feed.title: Public Policy Holding (NASDAQ: PPHC) grows to $186.5M revenue with global expansion
feed.summary: Public Policy Holding Company (PPHC) achieved $186.5 million in revenue for 2025, marking a 27.6% compound annual growth rate since 2018, driven by both organic growth and strategic acquisitions like TrailRunner and Pine Cove. Despite reporting a net loss of $39.0 million, the company generated a strong Adjusted EBITDA of $45.4 million, reflecting underlying profitability and successful expansion into global markets and diverse strategic communications services. PPHC plans to continue its growth strategy through further acquisitions and development of digital and data capabilities.

feed.title: Director at Polyrizon (PLRZ) sells 100 shares, retains 4,069
feed.summary: Polyrizon Ltd. director Carmel Liron reported an open-market sale of 100 Ordinary Shares at $11.00 per share on March 30, 2026. Following this transaction, Liron directly holds 4,069 ordinary shares, which include 1,463 unrestricted shares and 2,606 restricted ordinary shares that vest quarterly conditional on continued service. The filing also clarifies that no derivative securities were involved in this transaction.

feed.title: Polyrizon (PLRZ) CEO sells 3,900 shares, holding 32,012 afterward
feed.summary: Polyrizon Ltd.'s CEO, Tomer Izraeli, sold 3,900 Ordinary Shares at $10.90 per share in an open-market transaction on March 30, 2026. Following this sale, Izraeli directly holds 32,012 Ordinary Shares, which comprise both unrestricted and restricted shares. The restricted shares consist of 53 that vest monthly and 25,000 that vest quarterly, all subject to his continued service to the company.

feed.title: Polyrizon (PLRZ) CTO trims stake with 2,917-share open-market sale
feed.summary: Polyrizon Ltd.'s Chief Technology Officer, Tidhar Turgeman, has sold 2,917 Ordinary Shares at $10.90 per share in an open-market transaction, as reported in a recent Form 4 filing. Following this sale, Turgeman directly holds 17,518 Ordinary Shares, which include 18 restricted shares vesting monthly and 17,500 restricted shares vesting quarterly, contingent on his continued employment. The transaction is categorized as a neutral filing impact with a negative sentiment, reflecting a routine insider sale rather than a grant or option exercise.
